title: platea excelsa var. riedeliana
intro: Platea excelsa var. riedeliana, also known as Platea riedeliana, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is an evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Asia, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing and pain relief. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Platea riedeliana are often made into teas or infusions to be consumed for medicinal purposes.
